headline: Build sharper product surfaces with visible momentum every week.

activeFocus.title: Now board as a living product surface
activeFocus.summary: Turn planning notes into a browsable status surface with clear active bets and next deliverables.
targets: Publish active focus cards on homepage and dedicated page
Keep progress percentages and outcomes explicit
Use lightweight static data with no build step

activeFocus.title: Captain's Log publishing loop
activeFocus.summary: Reduce friction from shipped feature to share-ready digest so updates can be posted quickly.
targets: Add one-click publish targets to digest output
Keep filter presets for short and long recaps
Tie digest entries directly to release metadata

activeFocus.title: Roost Atlas path intelligence
activeFocus.summary: Make relationship exploration less noisy with route highlighting and shareable filtered views.
targets: Improve graph readability for larger release sets

recentWins: Shipped Roost Lab as a real-time theme prototyping studio
Added Flight Deck mission planner with persistent sprint briefs
Launched Captain's Log digest generator for shareable recaps
nextUp: Add publish-target presets to Captain's Log output
Introduce Atlas route filters and saved link state
Expand wallpaper drops into themed micro-collections
